titles.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Begins with sa’y Before Tawaf or Performs Tawaf and Delays sa’y
Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Begins with sa’y Before Tawaf or Performs Tawaf and Delays sa’y

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلٌ طَافَ بِالْكَعْبَةِ ثُمَّ خَرَجَ فَطَافَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ فَبَيْنَا هُوَ يَطُوفُ إِذْ ذَكَرَ أَنَّهُ قَدْ تَرَكَ مِنْ طَوَافِهِ بِالْبَيْتِ فَقَالَ «يَرْجِعُ إِلَى اَلْبَيْتِ فَيُتِمُّ طَوَافَهُ ثُمَّ يَرْجِعُ إِلَى اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ فَيُتِمُّ مَا بَقِيَ» قُلْتُ فَإِنَّهُ بَدَأَ بِالصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَبْدَأَ بِالْبَيْتِ قَالَ «يَأْتِي اَلْبَيْتَ فَيَطُوفُ بِهِ ثُمَّ يَسْتَأْنِفُ طَوَافَهُ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ » قُلْتُ فَمَا اَلْفَرْقُ بَيْنَ هَذَيْنِ قَالَ «لِأَنَّ هَذَا قَدْ دَخَلَ فِي شَيْءٍ مِنَ اَلطَّوَافِ وَ هَذَا لَمْ يَدْخُلْ فِي شَيْءٍ مِنْهُ ».
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلٌ طَافَ بِالْكَعْبَةِ ثُمَّ خَرَجَ فَطَافَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ فَبَيْنَا هُوَ يَطُوفُ إِذْ ذَكَرَ أَنَّهُ قَدْ تَرَكَ مِنْ طَوَافِهِ بِالْبَيْتِ فَقَالَ «يَرْجِعُ إِلَى اَلْبَيْتِ فَيُتِمُّ طَوَافَهُ ثُمَّ يَرْجِعُ إِلَى اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ فَيُتِمُّ مَا بَقِيَ» قُلْتُ فَإِنَّهُ بَدَأَ بِالصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَبْدَأَ بِالْبَيْتِ قَالَ «يَأْتِي اَلْبَيْتَ فَيَطُوفُ بِهِ ثُمَّ يَسْتَأْنِفُ طَوَافَهُ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ » قُلْتُ فَمَا اَلْفَرْقُ بَيْنَ هَذَيْنِ قَالَ «لِأَنَّ هَذَا قَدْ دَخَلَ فِي شَيْءٍ مِنَ اَلطَّوَافِ وَ هَذَا لَمْ يَدْخُلْ فِي شَيْءٍ مِنْهُ ».

segments:
Hadith.2824 - Safwan narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar: I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who performed Tawaf around the Ka'bah and then went out to perform Sa’y between Safa and Marwah. While he was performing Sa’y, he remembered that he had left part of his Tawaf incomplete.
Abu Abdullah (as) replied: "He should return to the Ka'bah, complete his Tawaf, and then return to Safa and Marwah to finish the remaining Sa’y."
I further asked: "What if he began with Safa and Marwah before performing Tawaf around the Ka'bah?"
Imam (as) replied: "He should go to the Ka'bah, perform Tawaf, and then restart his Sa’y between Safa and Marwah."
I then inquired: "What is the difference between these two cases?"
Imam (as) replied: "In the first case, he had already entered into part of the Tawaf, whereas in the second case, he had not yet begun any part of it."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2824 - Safwan narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar: I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who performed Tawaf around the Ka'bah and then went out to perform Sa’y between Safa and Marwah. While he was performing Sa’y, he remembered that he had left part of his Tawaf incomplete.
Abu Abdullah (as) replied: "He should return to the Ka'bah, complete his Tawaf, and then return to Safa and Marwah to finish the remaining Sa’y."
I further asked: "What if he began with Safa and Marwah before performing Tawaf around the Ka'bah?"
Imam (as) replied: "He should go to the Ka'bah, perform Tawaf, and then restart his Sa’y between Safa and Marwah."
I then inquired: "What is the difference between these two cases?"
Imam (as) replied: "In the first case, he had already entered into part of the Tawaf, whereas in the second case, he had not yet begun any part of it."

narratorChain.raw: 2824 - رَوَى صَفْوَانُ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Begins with sa’y Before Tawaf or Performs Tawaf and Delays sa’y

segments:
Hadith.2825 - Abdullah ibn Sinan asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who arrives for Hajj and finds the heat unbearable, so he performs Tawaf around the Ka'bah but delays the Sa’y until it cools down.
Abu Abdullah (as) replied: "There is no harm in doing so, and I have sometimes done it myself."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2825 - Abdullah ibn Sinan asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who arrives for Hajj and finds the heat unbearable, so he performs Tawaf around the Ka'bah but delays the Sa’y until it cools down.
Abu Abdullah (as) replied: "There is no harm in doing so, and I have sometimes done it myself."

narratorChain.raw: 2825 - وَ سَأَلَهُ عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَقْدَمُ حَاجّاً وَ قَدِ اِشْتَدَّ عَلَيْهِ اَلْحَرُّ فَيَطُوفُ بِالْكَعْبَةِ وَ يُؤَخِّرُ اَلسَّعْيَ إِلَى أَنْ يَبْرُدَ فَقَالَ

parts.text: قَدِ اِشْتَدَّ عَلَيْهِ اَلْحَرُّ فَيَطُوفُ بِالْكَعْبَةِ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Begins with sa’y Before Tawaf or Performs Tawaf and Delays sa’y

segments: 2826 - وَ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ : «يُؤَخِّرُهُ إِلَى اَللَّيْلِ ».
arabic.text: 2826 - وَ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ : «يُؤَخِّرُهُ إِلَى اَللَّيْلِ ».

segments: Hadith.2826 - In another narration, it is stated: "He may delay it until the night."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2826 - In another narration, it is stated: "He may delay it until the night."

titles.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Begins with sa’y Before Tawaf or Performs Tawaf and Delays sa’y

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ فَأَعْيَا أَ يُؤَخِّرُ اَلطَّوَافَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ إِلَى غَدٍ قَالَ «لاَ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ فَأَعْيَا أَ يُؤَخِّرُ اَلطَّوَافَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ إِلَى غَدٍ قَالَ «لاَ».

segments:
Hadith.2827 - Al-'Ala reported from Muhammad ibn Muslim, who narrated from one of the holy Imams (as) saying: "I asked him about a man who circumambulated the House (Ka'bah) and became weary. Can he delay the Sa'y between Safa and Marwah until the next day?"
Imam (as) replied: "No."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2827 - Al-'Ala reported from Muhammad ibn Muslim, who narrated from one of the holy Imams (as) saying: "I asked him about a man who circumambulated the House (Ka'bah) and became weary. Can he delay the Sa'y between Safa and Marwah until the next day?"
Imam (as) replied: "No."

narratorChain.raw: 2827 - وَ رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Begins with sa’y Before Tawaf or Performs Tawaf and Delays sa’y

segments:
Hadith.2828 - Rifa'a asked him about a man who is performing Tawaf around the House (Ka'bah) when the time for the Asr prayer begins. Should he perform Sa'y before praying, or should he pray before performing Sa'y?
Imam (as) replied: "There is no harm in praying first and then performing Sa'y."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2828 - Rifa'a asked him about a man who is performing Tawaf around the House (Ka'bah) when the time for the Asr prayer begins. Should he perform Sa'y before praying, or should he pray before performing Sa'y?
Imam (as) replied: "There is no harm in praying first and then performing Sa'y."

narratorChain.raw: 2828 - وَ سَأَلَهُ رِفَاعَةُ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ فَيَدْخُلُ وَقْتُ اَلْعَصْرِ أَ يَسْعَى قَبْلَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ أَوْ يُصَلِّي قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْعَى قَالَ

parts.text: اَلرَّجُلِ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ فَيَدْخُلُ وَقْتُ اَلْعَصْرِ أَ يَسْعَى قَبْلَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ أَوْ يُصَلِّي قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْعَى
